response:
* The abstract discusses the relationship between astrocytic coverage and glutamate clearance in the hypothalamic supraoptic nucleus.  
* It highlights that glutamate clearance affects concentration and diffusion in the extracellular space.  
* The study shows that reduced glutamate clearance impacts transmitter release through presynaptic metabotropic glutamate receptors.  
* Astrocytic wrapping is linked to the regulation of synaptic efficacy in the central nervous system.  
* The title mentions "glial coverage of neurons," which aligns with the abstract's focus on astrocytic coverage.  
* The title refers to "control of glutamate clearance," which is a central theme in the abstract.  
* The title also mentions "synaptic efficacy," a key point discussed in the abstract.  
* The abstract and title both emphasize the role of glial cells in modulating synaptic function.  
* *highlighted section* The title accurately reflects the main findings and focus of the abstract.  
* The title is concise and captures the essence of the research presented in the abstract.  
* The title and abstract are consistent in their content and emphasis.
